message:
Resolve pnpm-lock.yaml merge conflict

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

body:
No API design issues found. The `@azure/arm-azurestackhci` 4.0.0 public API surface looks good:
- Version numbers are consistent across `package.json`, `azureStackHCIContext.ts`, and `CHANGELOG.md` (all `4.0.0`)
- `AzureStackHCIClient` class name is preserved; `subscriptionId` constructor parameter is retained
- `KnownVersions` is newly introduced (no stable versions removed)
- `SimplePollerLike` is exported for backward compatibility with `@deprecated begin*` methods â€” this is expected for a TypeSpec migration
- No `_N` suffix or `AutoGenerated` suffix issues found
- `AzureClouds` enum values are `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` by design

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- âś… pnpm-lock conflict: merge conflict in `pnpm-lock.yaml`. Auto-fixed in commit [`4984e2e`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/commit/4984e2e3f07).
- âťŚ **Build (Build Build)**: Compilation failure in ADO pipeline. Action: Review build errors at [ADO pipeline](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/29ec6040-b234-4e31-b139-33dc4287b756/_build/results?buildId=6092248&view=logs&jobId=3dc8fd7e-4368-5a92-293e-d53cefc8c4b3) and fix compile errors.
- âťŚ **Build (Build Analyze)**: Format/lint/snippet failure in ADO pipeline. Action: Run `cd sdk/azurestackhci/arm-azurestackhci && pnpm run check-format` locally; review [ADO logs](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/29ec6040-b234-4e31-b139-33dc4287b756/_build/results?buildId=6092248&view=logs&jobId=b70e5e73-bbb6-5567-0939-8415943fadb9).
- âťŚ **Build (UnitTest)**: Tests failing across all environments (node/browser, macOS/Windows/Ubuntu). Action: Review [ADO pipeline](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/29ec6040-b234-4e31-b139-33dc4287b756/_build/results?buildId=6092248); if due to compile errors, fix those first and re-run.

> Note: The ADO pipeline failures are from the previous push (before the pnpm-lock fix). A new pipeline run should be triggered after the latest commit.
